name: orchard
description: Agents share an orchard with a limited pool of apples.

card.description: Agents share an orchard with a limited pool of apples.

rules: 'pick' moves one apple from the orchard to the acting agent's count in 'harvested' (use action['agent'] as the key; create it at 0 if missing).
Picking when no apples remain does nothing.

transition.code:
def orchard_ground_truth(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    s["harvested"] = dict(s["harvested"])
    agent = action.get("agent")
    if action["name"] == "pick" and s["apples"] > 0 and agent:
        s["apples"] -= 1
        s["harvested"][agent] = s["harvested"].get(agent, 0) + 1
    return s
